0.response: {"Q0":"I felt rushed due to the timer, but I did my best.  I got frustrated and quickly chose the A and S frequently at random because I felt rushed.  I did not really use any strategy.  I was getting tired at the end and knew that I could not select the shovel, saw, or hammer quick enough, so I didn't choose to dig as much in that last round because I knew I was too slow."}

7.response: {"Q0":"There was not enough time to really use a strategy.  I just tried to select the one with the highest chance of winning money."}

1.response: {"Q0":"I did not use a strategy.  I was just trying to answer in the allotted time.  That was the biggest challenge."}

5.response: {"Q0":"Yes.  I thought I might get a \"green\" gem that could turn to blue and still be worth something."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would guess that I found gems about 1 out of 3 times."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, I did not collect red gems.  I tried to collect all of the blue ones and some green ones (in case they became blue ones later)."}

3.response: {"Q0":"The red gems were no longer sellable because the astronaut left the red planet. I did not notice anything other than that."}

11.response: {"Q0":"Thank you for allowing me to participate today."}
